title: NetherPortalHelper
description: Precise coordinate calculator and navigation HUD for Nether portal linking.
body:
# 🔮 Nether Portal Helper

**Stop doing math. Start linking portals perfectly.**

We've all been there: You build a portal in the Nether, step through, and end up inside a stone wall—hundreds of blocks away from your base. **Nether Portal Helper** is the simple, client-side utility that solves this problem forever.

No more calculators, no more F3 debug screens, and no more guessing.

-----

## ✨ Features

* **🧠 Zero Mental Math:** The moment you stand still, the mod instantly calculates the exact coordinate conversion between Overworld (x8) and Nether (/8).
* **🔒 Target Locking System:** Found the perfect spot? Press **[P]** to "freeze" the target coordinates. The mod remembers them for you, so you don't have to write them down.
* **🧭 3D Navigation Compass:** Once locked, a large, intuitive 3D arrow appears on your screen. It guides you to the *exact* block you need to place your portal on.
    * **Green Arrow:** You are on the right path.
    * **Red Arrow:** You are going the wrong way (turn around!).
    * **Checkmark (✔):** You have reached the perfect spot. Build here!
* **📏 Precision Mode:** The mod checks if you are on the exact block grid (X and Z) to ensure a 1:1 perfect link.
* **👀 Stay Immersed:** The UI is designed to be minimal. Toggle the entire overlay on or off instantly with **[F6]**.

-----

## 🎮 How it works

1.  **Scout:** Stand where you want your portal in the Overworld.
2.  **Lock:** Look at the HUD (Top Left) and press **[P]** to lock the destination coordinates.
3.  **Travel:** Enter the Nether.
4.  **Navigate:** Follow the large navigation arrow in the center of your screen.
5.  **Build:** When the arrow turns into a green Checkmark (✔) and says **"BUILD HERE"**, place your obsidian.
6.  **Done:** Light it up! Your portals are now perfectly linked.

-----

## 🌍 Global Support

The mod automatically adapts to your language settings. Fully translated into:

* 🇺🇸 English
* 🇩🇪 German
* 🇪🇸 Spanish
* 🇫🇷 French
* 🇷🇺 Russian
* 🇨🇳 Chinese (Simplified)
* 🇵🇱 Polish

-----

## ⚙️ Installation & Config

* **Client-Side Only:** You can use this on any server (Vanilla, Spigot, Paper, Modded) without the server needing to install it.
* **Default Keys:**
    * `P` : Freeze/Unfreeze Coordinates
    * `F6` : Toggle Overlay Visibility
    * *(Keys can be changed in the standard Minecraft Controls menu)*

-----

### 🐞 Issues & Feedback

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please report it on the [Issues Page](https://github.com/Aleksej-Ranke/netherportalhelper/issues).
